tests_added: test_repo_app_typecheck - runs tsgo -b typecheck on packages/app
test_repo_app_unit_tests - runs bun test:unit on packages/app
p2p_enrichment.notes: Discovered CI from .github/workflows/test.yml and typecheck.yml. Both typecheck and unit tests pass on base commit. Typecheck uses tsgo (fast Go-based TS compiler). Unit tests use bun test with 299 tests across 51 files.

validate.notes: Docker build successful. NOP test: 3 expected failures (followup persistence not yet added), reward=0. Gold test: all 15 tests pass including persistence wrapper, workspace-scoped storage, and all AGENTS.md rules, reward=1. Rubric judge skipped due to missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY but validated successfully in previous runs (ICR >= 0.8).
